full_name: Austenitic stainless steel X2CrNiMo17-12-2, material number 1.4404 (AISI 316L)
scope: Low-carbon molybdenum-alloyed austenitic stainless steel; the low carbon (max 0.03%) reduces sensitization for improved intergranular corrosion resistance in the as-welded condition. Widely used in chemical, food, marine and architectural applications.
license_note: Grade name (X2CrNiMo17-12-2 / 1.4404 / 316L) and its nominal composition and typical mechanical property ranges are widely reproduced across free manufacturer datasheets and reference sites; no paywalled EN standard text reproduced.
